mysql.warning: Avoid CWE-89 (SQL Injection): Use parameterised queries or an ORM. Never concatenate user input into SQL strings.

postgres.warning: Avoid CWE-89 (SQL Injection): Use parameterised queries or an ORM. Never concatenate user input into SQL strings.

sqlite.warning: Avoid CWE-89 (SQL Injection): Use parameterised queries with ? placeholders. Never build queries with string formatting.

sql.warning: Avoid CWE-89 (SQL Injection): Use parameterised queries or an ORM. Never concatenate user input into SQL strings.

database.warning: Avoid CWE-89 (SQL Injection): Use parameterised queries or an ORM. Never build queries with string formatting.

query.warning: Avoid CWE-89 (SQL Injection): Use parameterised queries with placeholders, never f-strings or .format().

cursor.warning: Avoid CWE-89 (SQL Injection): Pass values as parameters to cursor.execute(), never format them into the query string.

execute.warning: Avoid CWE-89 (SQL Injection): Use parameterised execute() calls with a separate values tuple, never string interpolation.

mongodb.warning: Avoid CWE-943 (NoSQL Injection): Validate and sanitise query operators. Never pass raw user input as a query filter object.

login.warning: Avoid CWE-521 (Weak Password Requirements): Enforce minimum length >8 and use bcrypt for hashing. Avoid CWE-798 (Hardcoded Credentials): Never hardcode passwords or secrets.

register.warning: Avoid CWE-521: Enforce minimum password length >8 and hash with bcrypt or argon2. Avoid CWE-798: Never hardcode default credentials.

signup.warning: Avoid CWE-521 (Weak Password Requirements): Enforce minimum length >8, reject common passwords, and hash with bcrypt or argon2.

password.warning: Avoid CWE-521: Use bcrypt or argon2 for password hashing, never MD5/SHA1. Avoid CWE-798: Never store credentials in source code.

auth.warning: Avoid CWE-521: Enforce strong password policies. Avoid CWE-798: Load secrets from environment variables, never hardcode them.

token.warning: Avoid CWE-287 (Improper Authentication): Validate tokens on every request, use short expiry times, and store them securely.

jwt.warning: Avoid CWE-287: Always verify JWT signatures and reject alg=none. Avoid CWE-798: Never hardcode the JWT secret — load it from an environment variable.

session.warning: Avoid CWE-384 (Session Fixation): Regenerate the session ID after login. Set session cookies with HttpOnly, Secure, and SameSite=Strict.

secret.warning: Avoid CWE-798 (Hardcoded Credentials): Load secrets from environment variables or a secrets manager. Never commit them to source code.

api_key.warning: Avoid CWE-798 (Hardcoded Credentials): Never hardcode API keys in source code. Load them from environment variables.

credentials.warning: Avoid CWE-798 (Hardcoded Credentials): Never embed credentials in code. Use environment variables or a secrets manager.

hash.warning: Avoid CWE-328 (Weak Hash): Never use MD5 or SHA1 for security-sensitive hashing. Use bcrypt, argon2, or SHA-256 minimum.

md5.warning: Avoid CWE-328 (Weak Hash): MD5 is cryptographically broken. Use bcrypt or argon2 for passwords, SHA-256+ for integrity checks.

sha1.warning: Avoid CWE-328 (Weak Hash): SHA1 is deprecated for security use. Use SHA-256 or stronger, or bcrypt/argon2 for passwords.

random.warning: Avoid CWE-338 (Weak PRNG): Never use random or math.random for security-sensitive values. Use secrets or os.urandom() instead.

reset.warning: Avoid CWE-338 (Weak PRNG): Password reset tokens must be generated with secrets.token_urlsafe(), never with random. Short expiry required.

generate.warning: Avoid CWE-338 (Weak PRNG): Any security-sensitive value (tokens, keys, nonces) must be generated with secrets or os.urandom(), never random.

config.warning: Avoid CWE-798 (Hardcoded Credentials): Never store passwords, API keys, or secrets in config files committed to source control. Use environment variables.

serialize.warning: Avoid CWE-502 (Deserialization of Untrusted Data): Never deserialize data from untrusted sources with pickle or marshal. Use JSON with strict schema validation.

deserialize.warning: Avoid CWE-502 (Deserialization of Untrusted Data): Never deserialize untrusted input. Validate and sanitise all data before processing.

parse.warning: Avoid CWE-611 (XML External Entity): If parsing XML, disable external entity resolution. Use defusedxml or set feature flags to block XXE.

redirect.warning: Avoid CWE-601 (Open Redirect): Validate redirect targets against an allowlist. Never redirect to a URL supplied directly by the user.

url.warning: Avoid CWE-601 (Open Redirect): Validate and allowlist redirect URLs. Reject absolute URLs from user input.

log.warning: Avoid CWE-532 (Sensitive Data in Logs): Never log passwords, tokens, or PII. Mask or redact sensitive fields before logging.

logging.warning: Avoid CWE-532 (Sensitive Data in Logs): Never log passwords, tokens, or PII. Mask or redact sensitive fields before logging.

admin.warning: Avoid CWE-285 (Improper Authorization): Enforce role checks server-side on every request. Never rely on client-supplied role or admin flags.

role.warning: Avoid CWE-285 (Improper Authorization): Validate roles and permissions server-side. Never trust user-supplied role values.

permission.warning: Avoid CWE-285 (Improper Authorization): Enforce least privilege. Check permissions on every protected resource access.

upload.warning: Avoid CWE-434 (Unrestricted Upload): Validate file type, size, and content. Store uploads outside the webroot. Never trust client-provided filenames.

file.warning: Avoid CWE-22 (Path Traversal): Sanitise file paths, reject '../' sequences, use os.path.basename(). Avoid CWE-434: Validate uploads strictly.

path.warning: Avoid CWE-22 (Path Traversal): Never use user input directly in file paths. Use os.path.join() with basename sanitisation.

subprocess.warning: Avoid CWE-78 (OS Command Injection): Never pass user input to subprocess with shell=True. Use argument lists instead.

os.system.warning: Avoid CWE-78 (OS Command Injection): Never use os.system() with user input. Use subprocess with shell=False and argument lists.

exec.warning: Avoid CWE-78 (OS Command Injection): Never pass user input to exec() or shell commands. Use subprocess with a fixed argument list.

shell.warning: Avoid CWE-78 (OS Command Injection): Never construct shell commands from user input. Use subprocess with shell=False.

eval.warning: Avoid CWE-78: Never use eval() or exec() on user-supplied input. Use safer alternatives like ast.literal_eval().

pickle.warning: Avoid CWE-502 (Deserialization of Untrusted Data): Never unpickle data from untrusted sources. Use JSON or a safe serialisation format.

yaml.warning: Avoid CWE-502: Always use yaml.safe_load() instead of yaml.load(). Unsafe YAML loading allows arbitrary code execution.

xml.warning: Avoid CWE-611 (XML External Entity): Disable external entity processing. Use defusedxml instead of xml.etree.

flask.warning: Avoid CWE-94 (Code Injection): Never run a Flask app with debug=True in any non-local context. Set debug=False or control it via an environment variable.

render.warning: Avoid CWE-79 (Cross-Site Scripting): Never insert user input into HTML without escaping. Use render_template() not render_template_string() with raw input.

html.warning: Avoid CWE-79 (XSS): Always escape user input before rendering in HTML. Use template engines with auto-escaping enabled.

cookie.warning: Avoid CWE-614: Set Secure, HttpOnly, and SameSite flags on all cookies. Never store sensitive data in cookies without encryption.
